title: 10 best herbal tinctures for dental plaque
description: Asiatic pennywort tinctures helps with dental plaque because of its unique composition that targets the underlying causes of plaque formation. The tincture's antimicrobial properties inhibit the growth of bacteria and fungi that contribute to plaque accumulation, while its anti-inflammatory effects reduce gum inflammation and irritation.
